hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const c=i.tool_input?.content||'';const lines=c.split('\n').length;if(lines>800){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: file exceeds 800 lines ('+lines+'). Split into smaller modules.');process.exit(2)}console.log(d)})"
cd /Users/mac/Documents/ai_forum/web && [ -f node_modules/.bin/tsc ] && node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | head -40 || echo 'tsc not available, skipping'
hooks.description: Type-check web app after frontend edits
